hero.subtitle: Marketing, Innovation & Digital Strategy Specialist
hero.unifiedIntro: With a solid foundation in Design and UX, my career has evolved to the center of digital strategy. Today, my focus is on using competitive intelligence, automation, and data analysis to coordinate marketing projects that generate real growth and innovation. Based in Rio de Janeiro.

strategy.title: Strategy & Competitive Intelligence
strategy.desc: MBA in Competitive Intelligence. Market analysis, benchmarking, and data-driven strategic positioning.

automation.title: Automation & No-Code Development
automation.desc: Creating solutions, automations, and MicroSaaS with No-Code tools and AI to scale results.

performance.title: Performance & Paid Media
performance.desc: Specialized management of Google Ads and Meta Ads. ROI optimization and campaign performance analysis.

ux.title: UX/UI & Design Thinking
ux.desc: User-centered design. Prototyping, usability testing, and high-conversion interfaces.

analytics.title: Data Analysis & ROI
analytics.desc: Actionable metrics, dashboards, and KPI analysis for data-driven decisions.

klini.title: Klini Health Visual Identity
klini.desc: Complete visual identity development for digital health startup, including logo, color palette, and applications.

growth.title: Digital Growth Campaign
growth.desc: Strategy and execution of performance campaign focused on accelerated growth and CAC optimization.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard UX/UI
dashboard.desc: Interface and experience design for B2B analytics dashboard, focused on complex data visualization.

lab.title: Innovation Lab (No-Code, AI & MicroSaaS)
lab.subtitle: Projects that connect strategy, design, and technological development

website.title: Website & Automation (Family Consultant)
website.desc: Complete development (No-Code) of service platform, integrating blog, booking system, and lead capture automation. Focus on technical SEO and performance.

portfolio.title: Interactive Portfolio (Personal Project)
portfolio.desc: Design (UI/UX) and implementation of this portfolio, focused on micro-interactions, advanced animations, and No-Code architecture, serving as a proof of concept.

microsaas.title: MicroSaaS (In Development)
microsaas.desc: Development of a MicroSaaS solution focused on optimizing performance reports for agencies, using AI and No-Code tools.

dashboard.title: Performance Dashboard (Doctor Creator Board)
dashboard.desc: Development of an analytical dashboard (under construction) for content creators in healthcare. Focus on data visualization and engagement metrics.

platform.title: Management Platform (BeautyPro Hub)
platform.desc: Ideation and development of a MicroSaaS platform (under construction) for makeup artists. Focus on scheduling, client management, and portfolio.

strategy.title: Data-Driven Strategy
strategy.desc: MBA in Competitive Intelligence focused on market analysis and strategic positioning. I transform complex data into actionable insights for competitive advantage.

performance.title: Performance & Paid Media
performance.desc: Specialization in paid traffic management (Google Ads and Meta Ads). Continuous campaign optimization focused on ROI and performance metrics.

innovation.title: Development & Technological Innovation
innovation.desc: I connect marketing strategy to practical development. I build solutions, automations, and MicroSaaS with No-Code tools and AI to create competitive advantage and scale results.

aboutHero.intro: With a solid foundation in Design and UX, my career has evolved to the center of digital strategy. Today, my focus is on using competitive intelligence, automation, and data analysis to coordinate marketing projects that generate real growth and innovation.

about.title: About Me
about.text1: Graphic designer with over 5 years of experience and marketing coordinator specialized in digital innovation, currently pursuing an MBA in Competitive Intelligence and Data-Driven Marketing in Rio de Janeiro.
about.text2: My professional journey combines visual creativity with strategic thinking and market analysis, allowing me to develop solutions that not only visually delight but also generate measurable results for businesses.
about.text3: Specialized in paid traffic management (Google Ads and Meta Ads), strategic branding, design thinking applied to innovation, and competitive intelligence. I transform data and market insights into visual strategies and digital marketing campaigns that drive growth.
about.quote: I believe that exceptional design goes beyond aesthetics—it must be data-driven, user-centered, and aligned with business objectives to generate real impact.

contact.title: Let's Create Something Amazing
contact.subtitle: Get in touch to discuss how we can work together
contact.name: Name
contact.redirectingDesc: You will be redirected to continue the conversation.

footer.description: Digital Marketing, Competitive Intelligence and Innovation Specialist. Transforming data into strategies that generate results.

items.quote: Paula completely transformed our digital strategy. Her knowledge in automation and No-Code allowed us to scale much faster than we imagined.
items.author: John Silva

items.quote: Working with Paula was an exceptional experience. She not only delivered measurable results in media performance, but also brought a strategic vision that changed our business.
items.author: Mary Santos

items.quote: Paula's ability to connect strategy with technical execution is impressive. She developed solutions that saved significant time and resources.
items.author: Carlos Oliveira

caseStudy.challenge: The client needed a professional digital presence that reflected their expertise in family consulting, with an integrated scheduling system and automated lead capture. The challenge was to create a complete solution without compromising performance or user experience.
caseStudy.solution: I developed a complete platform using No-Code tools, integrating responsive design, SEO-optimized blog, scheduling system and lead automation. The focus was on creating a scalable architecture with excellent performance.
